title: Use pnpm, not npm, for workspace installs
summary: User corrected our assumption that npm is the package manager; this repo uses pnpm workspaces.
details: Attempted `npm install` in the root, which caused a lockfile mismatch and installed dependencies incorrectly. The repository uses pnpm with a pnpm-lock.yaml and workspace configuration. Using npm led to inconsistent node_modules and broken scripts.
suggested_action: Document in CLAUDE.md that the package manager is pnpm and update onboarding scripts to run `pnpm install`. Add a guard in CI to fail if `npm install` is detected.

title: Default Git branch is main, not master
summary: Assumed default branch was 'master' which broke branch-based scripts.
details: Our release script referenced `origin/master` when tagging versions. This repository's default branch is `main`. The mismatch caused a failed checkout during CI, halting the pipeline.
suggested_action: Change all scripts to reference `main`. Add a configurable DEFAULT_BRANCH variable with fallback to `main`. Update docs to reflect the branch name.

title: Enable strict mode in Bash scripts
summary: Discovered that enabling `set -euo pipefail` prevents silent failures and improves reliability.
details: A maintenance script skipped an essential step because an unset variable expanded to empty, and a pipeline error was ignored. Adding `set -euo pipefail` plus a safe IFS and a trap improved error visibility and halted on failure.
suggested_action: Adopt a Bash strict-mode header in all project scripts: `set -euo pipefail; IFS=$'\n\t'; trap 'echo "Error on line ${LINENO}" >&2' ERR`. Provide a script template.

title: Chunk manager failed: session.json missing
summary: Running structural chunking crashed because the session directory was not initialized.
details: Executed `python3 scripts/chunk_manager.py structural-chunk 20260407-ABC /data/book.txt` before creating the session. The tool expects an existing session.json to update total_chunks, resulting in a FileNotFoundError.
suggested_action: Ensure `session_manager.py create` runs before any chunking. Add a precheck in chunk_manager.py to create or guide the user when session.json is missing.
error_text:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "scripts/chunk_manager.py", line 153, in cmd_save
    session = json.loads(sp.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/home/user/.openclaw/workspace/memory/sequential_read/20260407-ABC/session.json'

title: Node handler crashed on undefined event context
summary: OpenClaw hook handler threw a TypeError when 'event.context' was missing.
details: During agent bootstrap testing, the hook received an event object without a context property. The handler accessed `event.context.bootstrapFiles` unguarded, causing a crash.
suggested_action: Add defensive checks for undefined context and return early. Include runtime validation and unit tests for handler inputs.
error_text:
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bootstrapFiles')
    at handler (hooks/openclaw/handler.js:34:28)
    at Object.<anonymous> (hooks/openclaw/handler.js:52:1)

title: Auto-increment recurrence count for Pattern-Key entries
summary: User asked for a helper to automatically find and update recurring Pattern-Key entries in LEARNINGS.md.
details: Manually searching `.learnings/LEARNINGS.md` to update `Recurrence-Count` is error-prone. A small tool could grep by Pattern-Key, bump counts, and maintain First-Seen/Last-Seen dates.
suggested_action: Create a CLI helper `update_pattern_count.py` to locate Pattern-Key entries, increment counts, and update dates. Integrate with the simplify-and-harden feed.
user_context: Happens weekly when processing the simplify-and-harden candidate list.

title: Use ISO-8601 timestamps with Z suffix
summary: User corrected timestamp formatting in logs; we used local time without Z.
details: Several entries had `2026-04-11T12:38:00` without a timezone. The standard used by this project is ISO-8601 UTC with Z suffix, e.g., `2026-04-11T12:38:00Z`.
suggested_action: Update logging helpers to force UTC and append Z. Add a validation step that rejects timestamps without Z.

title: Validate and sanitize external inputs before processing
summary: Adopt input validation for CLI args, API payloads, and batch jobs to prevent downstream errors.
details: Multiple tasks failed due to missing required fields or unsafe path inputs (e.g., '..' segments). Adding schema validation (pydantic for Python, zod for TypeScript) and path normalization prevents crashes and miswrites.
suggested_action: Introduce centralized validators: pydantic models for Python services, zod schemas for TS, and guard-rails for CLI. Reject invalid inputs early with helpful errors.
